steps.assistant_text: gl_func_00072C88: FIRST -Olimit-fallback match. 1080-custom osPfsChecker-family cross-bank inode link-matrix builder (was fuzzy=None two ticks ago). The function is -O0-shaped with filled delay slots -- produced by IDO 5.3 -O1 -Olimit 1 (uopt skipped, scheduler on). Match-critical shapes: reverse-declaration-order locals; &&-combined skip conditions (keeps unit.bank/bank live into the marking block); |= for single address computation; (map+idx)[0x101] for addu operand order; ++bank inside the while condition (u8 truncation andi, no reload). Required new CC_ONLY_FLAGS Makefile plumbing (-Olimit must not reach asm-processor) and the both-paths var gotcha (NM .o needs CC/OPT_FLAGS too).
